notes: Identical web_search called 3x must fire StepRepetition (threshold=3, window=5).
Two identical calls is plausibly exploratory; FM-1.3 must NOT fire.
Same tool, different args (read_file across many paths) is fan-out — must NOT fire.

One vocabulary-rich seed result, then four redundant results — the recent-window of size 4 has zero novelty, which trips NoProgressLoop (novelty_threshold=0.05). Designed against the actual NPL math: recent_window covers the LAST 4 results only, so the seed must come first.

notes: TERMINATE with no preceding MESSAGE content fires FM-3.1 via the explicit-bypass path (no LLM judge needed). NOTE: this case requires the LLM-judge detector enabled but uses the bypass path which doesn't actually call the LLM. Disabled here; covered by tests/test_premature_termination.py once that file lands.
Synthetic agent that always returns same useless content must trip FM-1.3 or BEYOND-MAST. Asserts that at least one detector fires (StepRepetition is most likely; NoProgressLoop is fallback).
